stemHtml: When does the holdover time (HOT) start in a one-step de-icing / anti-icing process?

options.a: At the end of the de-icing application.
options.b: At the start of the anti-icing application.
options.c: At the start of the de-icing / anti-icing application.
options.d: At the end of the de-icing / anti-icing application.
